intentSynonyms: get a directions url in gmaps
look up a directions url in gmaps
fetch a single directions url in gmaps
view one specific directions url in gmaps
generate a shareable directions link in gmaps
description: Generate a Google Maps directions URL between two points that can be shared. Does not navigate — just returns the URL. Useful for sharing directions in messages, emails, or documents.

origin.description: Starting point — address, place name, or "lat,lng" coordinates

destination.description: End point — address, place name, or "lat,lng" coordinates
